claudeResult.resultText:
The dashboard is on the canvas. Open http://localhost:7814/?session=d288e180-4661-43e1-9eba-e91beba78fb9 to view it.

Layout is a vertical Stack: a header, then a 3-column Grid of Metric tiles (Build Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2), then a 2-column Grid holding the bar chart of build durations and the line chart of deploy counts, each in its own Card. Both charts are keyed off Mon–Sun and read from spec state, so a `canvas_patch` against `/state/durations` or `/state/deploys` is enough to update the numbers later.

One correction along the way: my first push used `gap: "xs"` on the header Stack, which isn't a valid spacing value (the scale is none/sm/md/lg/xl), so I re-pushed with `sm`. I couldn't take a verification snapshot because no canvas browser tab is connected yet — once you open the link, tell me if anything looks off and I'll adjust.
